name: risqbase
description: DTCG 2025.10 resolver — declares the base token sets and the theme contexts. Replaces the v4.2-era ad-hoc themes/*.json mechanism (v4.4 §A4). The build (tools/tokens-build) reads this document to discover themes; consumers keep the <html data-theme> contract: light is the default (:root), every other context emits a [data-theme="<name>"] block in dist/tokens.css.

sets.name: base
sets.description: Three-tier token graph — primitives, semantic aliases, component roles. Light values; light is the default context.

modifiers.name: theme
modifiers.description: Theme contexts. light = base set as-is. dark extends base with the override set ($extends semantics: a context may only re-bind tokens the base defines — lint-enforced). High contrast is intentionally NOT a token theme (D-107): it is a forced-colors / prefers-contrast compliance contract, documented at docs/theming.md.
